fasta.title: Genome FASTA
fasta.description: Reference genome FASTA used to build the Kallisto index.

gtf.title: GTF Annotation
gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF for building a splice-aware Kallisto index.

kallisto_version.title: Kallisto Version
kallisto_version.description: Select the specific version of Kallisto to use (see quay.io/biocontainers/kallisto for available versions)

transcriptome_source.title: Transcriptome Source (optional)
transcriptome_source.description: Tool used to generate the transcriptome FASTA from genome + GTF (only applies when GTF is provided). Use gffread for prokaryotic genomes; use rsem for eukaryotic genomes.

kallisto_extra_args.title: Extra Arguments
kallisto_extra_args.description: Additional arguments to pass to kallisto index.
